text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists as a real, verified publication in *Nature Methods* (2020, Vol. 17, No. 7, pp. 665–680, DOI: 10.1038/s41592-020-0848-2). The cited authors (25 of 108) are a subset of the actual author list; this is a large collaborative paper where truncating the author list is a standard citation practice, and all 25 cited authors do appear among the real authors.
LINK: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41592-020-0848-2
